chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Cr. Misc Appln No. S-339 of 2023 Cr. Misc Appln No. S-340 of 2023 _______________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_______ For hearing of main case. 12-03-2025 Applicant present in person. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, Dy. Prosecutor General. Respondents present in person. -------- Khalid Hussain Shahani, J:- The applicant, Muhammad Ayoob Kolachi, has invoked the inherent jurisdiction of this Court under Section 561-A of the Cr.P.C., seeking judicial review of and redress against the order dated 02.10.2023, passed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Mehar, in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2455/2023 and 2456/2023, whereby said applications, filed under Sections 22-A & B Cr.P.C, were dismissed. 02. Learned Counsel for the applicant called absent. Record reflects that since filing of instant criminal miscellaneous applications, learned Counsel has preferred to remain absent. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has pointed out that alleged incident for which applicant wants to register case against proposed accused is un-witnessed one and result of personal vendetta, as prior to this, proposed accused Mst. Farzana had filed a criminal miscellaneous application No.238 of 2023, for according direction to the SHO concerned to lodge F.I.R., that too was dismissed. Prima facie it appears that to counter such application, applicant intends to register case against the proposed accused. Besides, from the contents of applications no case of a cognizable offence is made out. Therefore, this court has not been left with other option, except to dismiss both the criminal miscellaneous applications.

Besides, from the contents of applications no case of a cognizable offence is made out. Therefore, this court has not been left with other option, except to dismiss both the criminal miscellaneous applications. Order accordingly. JUDGE S.Ashfaq/-
